svg.desc: grass-idle idle_0: Generate a self-contained SVG 2D game asset. Use transparent background. No full-canvas background or opaque backdrop. Fit the requested frame size exactly. Set shape-rendering="crispEdges" on the SVG root. Use viewBox matching the requested size. Target size: 32x32. Output media type: image/svg+xml. Map tile asset. Use tile-filling rules instead of centered object rules. Fill the tile footprint with edge-safe patterns. Avoid single floating props. pixel art low-resolution readable clusters limited palette hard edges, no soft painterly gradients Composition contract: tile-filling terrain surface edge-safe pattern no centered pickup object Palette hint: base grass green. Palette hint: two darker grass clusters. Palette hint: one yellow-green highlight cluster. readable at 32x32 as a grass tile readable at 64x64 with repeated clusters readable at 128x128 without noisy micro-detail Subject: grass. Visual archetype: terrain_tile. terrain tile grass. full tile footprint seamless square terrain patch grass texture clusters tileable edges transparent or edge-safe background SVG shape hints: edge-safe small rect or path grass clusters; multiple short blades; no full-canvas opaque background block. No photorealistic. No blur. No low contrast. No cropped. No inconsistent frames. No busy background. No full-canvas background. No floating object. No character sprite. No anti-aliased painterly render. No photo texture. No character. No weapon. No ui button. No single floating item.
